Package ui.card

Class CardRenderResolver

java.lang.Object
ui.render.RenderResolver
ui.card.CardRenderResolver
public final class CardRenderResolver extends RenderResolver
Resolves the visual components of a Card into RenderState objects. Handles loading and mapping images for card materials, suits, and values.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RenderState
    resolveMaterial(Card card)
    Resolves the material image for a card.

    Resolves the value image for a card.

  • Method Details

    • resolveMaterial

      public static RenderState resolveMaterial(Card card)
      Resolves the material image for a card.
      Parameters:
      card - The Card to resolve.
      Returns:
      A RenderState containing the material image and properties.

    • resolveSuit

      public static RenderState resolveSuit(Card card)
      Resolves the suit image for a card.
      Parameters:
      card - The Card to resolve.
      Returns:
      A RenderState containing the suit image.

    • resolveValue

      public static RenderState resolveValue(Card card)
      Resolves the value image for a card.
      Parameters:
      card - The Card to resolve.
      Returns:
      A RenderState containing the value image.
